title: Eternal Starlight's Delight
description: A unofficial mod that adds collaborative elements between Farmer's Delight and Eternal Starlight.
body:
![ESDelight Meals (1.3.0)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YylITkmH/images/680d1591224579b3aed02a1ca3d060c7a7b56563.png) # About This is a mod that adds foods fitting the atmosphere of [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and the worldview of [Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight), along with code and data to ensure compatibility between these two.
## Extra foods (now 1.3.0)
・3 drying foods
・15 cut foods
・10 light meals
・2 ingredients
・8 meals
## New Blocks
### 4 mushrooms Colony
・Bouldershroom
・Glowing Mushroom
・Marimold
・Shining Mushroom
Bouldershroom will form a colony if Rich Soil is present at its base. ### 7 Cabinets
### 4? Crates
### Frozen Tube Bale
### (Forgotten) Nouturnal Millet Bale
### 3 Cooking Tools
・Starlight Stove
・Deepsilver Cooking Pot
・Deepsilver Skillet
The Starlight Stove, Deepsilver Cooking Pot, and Deepsilver Skillet double the cooking speed when preparing ingredients for Eternal Starlight and Eternal Starlight's Delight.
## New Other Items
### Extra 13 knives
・If the original material has special effects, they will also be applied to the knife.
### Add 1 knife's Accessory
・Thermal Springblade Strap
### Add 1 Skillet's Accessory
・Starfire Flower Strap
## Other Changes
・Add a recipe to the cutting board
・The recipe for the cutting board was provided by [Farmer's Cutting: Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-eternal-starlight).
・Added several other recipes.
・Wild crops from Farmers' Delight now appear in the Eternal Starlight biome.
・Throwing the Energy Boomerang onto a cutting board causes it to behave as if sliced by a knife.
・Some mobs in Eternal Starlight grant a drop bonus when defeated with a knife.
・Can plant Pungency Fruit in Rich Soil Farmland (Only Fabric).
・The effects of some Farmer's Delight seeds will be changed in Seeds Launcher.
・The stack limit for Eternal Starlight's stew-type items will be 16.
・Equipping the Fungus Amulet allows you to eat Mushroom Colonies.
・Put Nocturnal Millet into the “forgotten” state by planting it in Rich Soil.
・Plants growing on Rich Soil or Rich Soil Farmland mitigate the effect that eliminates Nocturnal Millet crops.
